serviceNotes.engine oil: Pre-CBS EU fixed intervals ~15,000 km common for M43TU four-cylinder; verify printed maintenance table. Sources: BMW E46 service booklet.
serviceNotes.micro filter: Pollen filter per BMW fixed-interval booklet.
serviceNotes.air cleaner element: Fixed-interval engine air filter ~30,000 km typical for this generation.
serviceNotes.spark plugs: Four-cylinder petrol spark plugs per BMW maintenance table (~60,000 km typical).
serviceNotes.check front brake pads: Inspect every 15,000 km with oil service pattern.

serviceSources.engine oil: BMW owner's manual E46 — Oil Service; 15,000 km matches common EU fixed standard-oil schedule. Tier 2 cross-check: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service lists 10,000 km / 12 months for a compiled 320i entry — verify oil grade (LongLife vs standard) and market in your booklet
serviceSources.micro filter: BMW owner's manual E46 — cabin microfilter on Inspection II cadence (~30,000 km typical EU spacing between major inspections)
serviceSources.brake fluid: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake fluid replacement every 24 months (DOT 4 LV)
serviceSources.air cleaner element: BMW owner's manual E46 — engine air filter at Inspection II (~30,000 km typical). Tier 2: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service states 20,000 km for compiled 320i — confirm dust conditions / printed table
serviceSources.spark plugs: https://www.auto-abc.eu/BMW-3-serija/v2140-2000/service — spark plugs 60,000 km (matches file); BMW owner's manual E46 four-cylinder petrol
serviceSources.check front brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection aligned with regular service visits (~15,000 km oil-service cadence)
serviceSources.check rear brake pads: BMW owner's manual E46 — brake inspection aligned with regular service visits (~15,000 km oil-service cadence)
serviceSources.vehicle check: BMW owner's manual E46 — Inspection I/II vehicle check (~60,000 km typical EU major-inspection spacing)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: ZF/BMW specialist consensus; ATF often labelled lifetime in OEM literature — preventive change per independent recommendation
serviceSources.manual gearbox fluid: BMW owner's manual does not state a routine manual gearbox oil interval for E46 — preventive specialist interval
serviceSources.coolant flush: BMW owner's manual E46 specifies coolant change by model/year; file value is preventive extended interval — confirm in booklet
